Name: Accurate Attack
Description: When you make an accurate attack, you can take a penalty of up to –5 on the effect modifier of the attack and add the same number (up to +5) to your attack bonus.

Name: Agile Feint
Description: You can use your Acrobatics bonus or movement speed rank in place of Deception to feint and trick in combat.

Name: All-out Attack
Description: When you make an all-out attack, you can take a penalty of up to –5 on your active defenses (Dodge and Parry) and add the same number (up to +5) to your attack bonus.

Name: Improved Initiative
Description: +4 bonus to initiative checks per rank.

Name: Iron Will
Description: +2 circumstance bonus on Will resistance checks.

Name: Great Endurance
Description: +5 bonus on checks to avoid fatigue and to hold your breath.

Name: Evasion
Description: +2 circumstance bonus to Dodge checks to avoid area effects. Rank 2 increases bonus to +5.

Name: Attractive
Description: +2 circumstance bonus on Deception and Persuasion checks (+5 for rank 2).

Name: Eidetic Memory
Description: Perfect recall. +5 circumstance bonus on memory checks. Can make Expertise checks as if trained.

Name: Animal Empathy
Description: You have a special connection with animals. You can use interaction skills on animals normally.

Name: Artificer
Description: You can use the Expertise: Magic skill to create temporary magical devices.

Name: Assessment
Description: You can use Insight to able to judge an opponent’s relative combat capabilities.

Name: Beginner's Luck
Description: By spending a hero point, you gain an effective 5 ranks in a skill in which you currently have 0 ranks.

Name: Benefit
Description: You have some significant social or structural benefit, such as wealth, status, or a secret identity.

Name: Chokehold
Description: If you successfully grab and maintain a hold on an opponent, you can suffocate them.

Name: Connected
Description: You know people who can help you out. You can call in favors by making a Persuasion check.

Name: Contacts
Description: You have extensive contacts. You can make an Investigation check to gather information in only one minute.

Name: Daze
Description: You can make a Deception or Intimidation check as a standard action to cause an opponent to hesitate in combat.

Name: Defensive Attack
Description: Trade up to -5 attack bonus for an equal bonus (+5) to active defenses.

Name: Defensive Roll
Description: Receive a bonus to Toughness equal to rank. This is an active defense and is lost if vulnerable or defenseless.

Name: Diehard
Description: Automatically stabilize on the round after your condition becomes dying.

Name: Equipment
Description: You have 5 points per rank to spend on equipment, vehicles, and headquarters.

Name: Extraordinary Effort
Description: Gain two benefits of extra effort at once, but you become exhausted on the following turn.

Name: Fascinate
Description: One interaction skill captures attention. Target is entranced if check succeeds.

Name: Fast Grab
Description: Make a free grab check after hitting with an unarmed attack.

Name: Favored Environment
Description: +2 circumstance bonus to attack or active defense in a specific environment.

Name: Favored Foe
Description: +2 circumstance bonus on interaction and perception checks against a particular type of opponent.

Name: Fearless
Description: You are immune to fear effects.

Name: Grabbing Finesse
Description: Use Dexterity bonus instead of Strength bonus to make grab attacks.

Name: Hide in Plain Sight
Description: Hide without a Deception or Intimidation check or diversion.

Name: Improved Aim
Description: Double circumstance bonuses for aiming: +10 close, +5 ranged.

Name: Improved Critical
Description: Increase critical threat range with a chosen attack by 1 per rank.

Name: Improved Defense
Description: +2 circumstance bonus to active defenses when using the defend action.

Name: Improved Disarm
Description: No penalty to attack check to disarm and no counter-disarm attempt.

Name: Improved Grab
Description: Make grabs with one arm. Not vulnerable while grabbing.

Name: Improved Hold
Description: -5 circumstance penalty to escape your holds.

Name: Improved Smash
Description: No penalty to attack checks to hit an object held by another character.

Name: Improved Trip
Description: No penalty to trip and no counter-trip. You choose the defense used.

Name: Improvised Tools
Description: Ignore penalty for using skills without tools. Only -2 with no tools at all.

Name: Improvised Weapon
Description: Use Unarmed skill for improvised weapons. +1 damage per rank.

Name: Inspire
Description: Spend hero point to give allies +1 circumstance bonus per rank on all checks.

Name: Instant Up
Description: Stand from prone as a free action without an Acrobatics check.

Name: Interpose
Description: Once per round, take the hit for an adjacent ally hit by an attack.

Name: Inventor
Description: Use Technology skill to create inventions.

Name: Jack-of-all-trades
Description: Use any skill untrained.

Name: Languages
Description: Speak and understand additional languages.

Name: Leadership
Description: Spend hero point to remove dazed, fatigued, or stunned from an ally.

Name: Luck
Description: Re-roll a die roll once per round, up to rank times per session.

Name: Minion
Description: You have a follower with (rank x 15) power points.

Name: Move-by Action
Description: Move both before and after your standard action.

Name: Power Attack
Description: Trade up to -5 attack bonus for up to +5 effect bonus.

Name: Precise Attack
Description: Ignore cover or concealment penalties for close or ranged attacks.

Name: Prone Fighting
Description: No penalty to attack checks while prone; adjacent attackers gain no bonus.

Name: Quick Draw
Description: Draw a weapon as a free action.

Name: Ranged Attack
Description: +1 bonus to ranged attack checks per rank.

Name: Redirect
Description: Redirect a missed attack against you at an adjacent target if you trick the attacker.

Name: Ritualist
Description: Use Expertise: Magic skill to create and cast magical rituals.

Name: Second Chance
Description: Re-roll a failed check against a specific hazard or skill.

Name: Seize Initiative
Description: Spend hero point to automatically go first in initiative order.

Name: Set-up
Description: Transfer the benefits of an interaction skill in combat to one ally per rank.

Name: Sidekick
Description: You have a partner with (rank x 5) power points.

Name: Skill Mastery
Description: Make routine checks with a chosen skill even under pressure.

Name: Startle
Description: Use Intimidation rather than Deception to feint in combat.

Name: Takedown
Description: Free extra attack against adjacent minion after incapacitating one. Rank 2 allows movement.

Name: Taunt
Description: Use Deception rather than Intimidation to demoralize in combat.

Name: Teamwork
Description: +5 circumstance bonus to support team checks and aid actions.

Name: Throwing Mastery
Description: +1 damage bonus with thrown weapons per rank.

Name: Tracking
Description: Use Perception skill to visually follow tracks.

Name: Trance
Description: Slip into a deep trance with a minute of meditation and an Awareness check.

Name: Ultimate Effort
Description: Spend a hero point to treat a specific check result as a 20.

Name: Uncanny Dodge
Description: Not vulnerable when surprised or caught off-guard.

Name: Weapon Bind
Description: Make a disarm attempt as a reaction after a successful defense.

Name: Weapon Break
Description: Make an attack against an attacker's weapon as a reaction after a successful defense.

Name: Well-informed
Description: Immediate Investigation or Persuasion check to see what you know about a subject.
